notes:
mẹ = mother. It’s the normal, everyday word for your mom.

It’s a noun. You usually say mẹ + possessive like mẹ tôi, mẹ em, or just use mẹ alone when talking within the family. You don’t need a classifier in most cases.

Common pairing: bố mẹ = parents.  

In the South, people often say má instead of mẹ — same meaning, just regional.
exampleSentencesTranslated: Every morning, my mother prepares breakfast for me before I go to school.
He loves his mother because his mother always takes care of the whole family.
This weekend, she will visit her mother and help her cook.
exampleSentences: Mỗi buổi sáng, mẹ đều chuẩn bị bữa sáng cho em trước khi đi học.
Anh rất yêu mẹ vì mẹ luôn quan tâm và chăm sóc cho cả gia đình.
Cuối tuần này, chị sẽ về thăm mẹ và giúp mẹ nấu ăn.

definitions.vi: Người phụ nữ sinh ra hoặc nuôi dưỡng mình.
definitions.en: A woman who gives birth to or raises a child; mother.

example.en: Mom is cooking rice in the kitchen.
example.vi: Mẹ đang nấu cơm trong bếp.

translation.en: I asked my mother about the lesson.
